'''''Render''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. The ''Render'' arrived at the factory [[ZA-13]] to relieve [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

The ''Render's'' role at this station did not last long, for it was soon replaced, for unknown reasons, by two [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]].

{{Ship-stub}}
